description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI: sanitizer tests that runs on push to master and main branches, on pull request open and synchronize, on merge group checks requested, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow checks for changed files, then runs tests with address and memory sanitizers on an ubuntu-24.04 environment if code changes are detected or if the workflow is dispatched. The workflow uses reusable find changes, checks out the repository, sets up Bazel with caching, sets up Python 3.12 with pip caching, installs qsim requirements, and runs C++ tests with sanitizers.
